page.content:
In the Drug pipeline by development phase table, under DevelopmentPhase, Preclinical features DrugA for Cancer with UnitsSold at 15,000, Revenue of $200M, ApprovalStatus as InDevelopment, Headcount of 50, and ClinicalTrialsConducted totaling 5. PhaseI includes DrugB for Diabetes with UnitsSold of 30,000, Revenue of $450M, ApprovalStatus as InDevelopment, Headcount of 75, and ClinicalTrialsConducted at 8. In PhaseII, DrugC addresses Cardiovascular conditions with UnitsSold of 25,000, Revenue of $350M, ApprovalStatus InDevelopment, Headcount at 60, and ClinicalTrialsConducted numbering 7. PhaseIII showcases DrugD for Neurology with UnitsSold of 45,000, Revenue of $600M, ApprovalStatus as Approved, Headcount of 100, and ClinicalTrialsConducted at 10. DrugE, also in PhaseIII for InfectiousDiseases, has UnitsSold of 30,000, Revenue of $350M, ApprovalStatus Approved, Headcount of 80, and ClinicalTrialsConducted at 6. DrugF in Oncology is in PhaseII with UnitsSold of 20,000, Revenue of $275M, ApprovalStatus InDevelopment, Headcount of 55, and ClinicalTrialsConducted at 5. DrugG for Autoimmune diseases is Approved with UnitsSold of 18,000, Revenue of $300M, Headcount of 90, and ClinicalTrialsConducted totaling 4. In PhaseI, DrugH for Respiratory has UnitsSold at 12,000, Revenue of $180M, ApprovalStatus InDevelopment, Headcount of 45, and ClinicalTrialsConducted at 3. PhaseIII includes DrugI for Endocrine with UnitsSold of 22,000, Revenue of $310M, ApprovalStatus Approved, Headcount at 70, and ClinicalTrialsConducted at 6. DrugJ for Gastrointestinal in PhaseII shows UnitsSold of 16,000, Revenue of $240M, ApprovalStatus InDevelopment, Headcount of 50, and ClinicalTrialsConducted at 5. The total across all stages remains comprehensive. 

In the FinancialMetrics table, the Year 2021 shows Revenue of $50M, NetIncome of $5M, P/ERatio at 15.0, CurrentRatio at 2.5, and Debt/Equity at 0.5.

page.content: For 2022, Revenue reached $60M, NetIncome was $10M, P/ERatio at 16.5, CurrentRatio at 2.2, and Debt/Equity at 0.4. In 2023, Revenue is at $75M, NetIncome at $15M, P/ERatio at 18.0, CurrentRatio at 2.0, and Debt/Equity at 0.6. Projections for 2024 indicate Revenue of $90M, NetIncome of $20M, P/ERatio at 17.5, CurrentRatio at 2.3, and Debt/Equity at 0.7. For 2025, forecasts show Revenue of $110M, NetIncome of $25M, P/ERatio at 19.0, CurrentRatio at 2.4, and Debt/Equity at 0.6.

page.content: The 5-YearCAGR for Revenue stands at 20.0%, while NetIncome shows a CAGR of 40.0%, P/ERatio at 17.6%, CurrentRatio at 2.5, and Debt/Equity at 0.5, reflecting robust financial health and growth trends.
